name: plantuml-architect
description: Create and render PlantUML architecture diagrams before coding web applications.

interface.shortDescription: Design web architecture with PlantUML before coding.
interface.longDescription: PlantUML Architect gives Codex a diagram-as-code workflow for use case, sequence, class, activity, component, and deployment diagrams. It creates PlantUML files under docs/architecture and renders them to SVG through the local PlantUML CLI.
interface.defaultPrompt: Design the architecture first with PlantUML diagrams, then implement the web application.
